reason: Check focused and full Rust gates required after shared gateway changes.
Verify alias routes do not broaden request budgets or bypass gate/circuit accounting.
Check generated bindings, frontend boundaries, config migration, gateway and complete regression scope.
Verify current profile format coexists with main config ownership and no unknown state is overwritten.
Verify provider/transition/attempt semantics and ordinary failover regression coverage.
Verify shares remain additive, disabled and free of provider UUID/model/profile state.
Verify v1-v4 capability thresholds, preflight and all-or-nothing import behavior.
Verify config import retains existing lock order and concurrent-winner rollback safety.
Audit new helpers against existing URL, credential, body and atomic-file utilities.
Audit full source-to-store-to-IPC-to-UI data flow and shared decoder ownership.
Check the adapter implements only the documented OpenAI-compatible contract and safety bounds.
Check all four response paths, real mismatch warnings, unobserved evidence and final-provider pricing.
Check UUID lifecycle, local profile ownership, full import, copy and share semantics.
